data.body: CHECKPOINT: epic a88f — 8 of 12 stories COMPLETE + committed (18 commits), 163 tests green. DONE: WS-A (runner decompose->fs_tools), WS-B (DSL+parser+linter+migrate+CLI), WS-C (events+executor+tripwire+idempotency+lib/CLI/MCP-async), WS-E (scripted steps), WS-H (commits event), WS-I (Mermaid render), ffc4 (typed MCP schemas), WS-J (extras+optionality CI+setup wizard). Engine runs scripted workflows end-to-end across all 3 interfaces; lean-core optionality CI-enforced. REMAINING (heaviest, need deep langchain/eval/migration work): WS-D (e6c2 agentic runtime: RunRequest generalize, git-ref snapshot, scoped tool, multi-provider, create_agent v1, robust structured output), WS-F (0e35 invert resolve_prompt to git-canonical), WS-G (4014 Inspect/promptfoo evals; needs WS-F), WS-K (9f84 example workflows + retire LangflowRunner; needs WS-D).
